 {"id":"bd-16dr","title":"Add JFP client to flywheel-clients","description":"Goal:
- Add JFP client wrapper (prompt catalog) to flywheel-clients.

- Support status/list/search commands where available.
- Provide JSON parsing + error mapping via shared runner.

- Unit: bd-3gja + bd-9v6g.
- E2E: bd-mipc (stub harness).
- Schema drift: bd-20sm.

Definition of Done:
